user.title: Amazon Kids Parent Controls
user.description: Enter credentials harvested from a logged-in parents.amazon.com browser session. See the README for how to obtain these. Treat them like a password.

child.title: Add a child
child.description: Added so far: {added}. Enter this child's name and Amazon directedId. Find the directedId in your browser's Network tab: it appears as the childDirectedId query parameter on calls like get-adjusted-time-limits?childDirectedId=amzn1.account.XXXX. See the README for a full walkthrough.

data.name: Child's name
data.add_another: Add another child after this one

error.child_incomplete: Enter both a name and a directedId.
